news.t: Symmetry Partners Selects SEI's Advisors' Inner Circle Fund to Launch First ETF
Symmetry Partners Launches Symmetry Panoramic Sector Momentum ETF (Ticker: SMOM)

overview.description: The Symmetry Panoramic Sector Momentum ETF (SMOM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, using a fund-of-funds approach to provide systematic exposure to the S&P 500 sectors that are exhibiting strong relative price momentum. SMOM was launched on Sep 9, 2025 and is issued by Symmetry Panoramic.
